div.head: Memorandum of Conversation, by the Assistant Chief of the Division of Near Eastern Affairs (Jones)
div.p: At my request Mr. EralpMr. Orhan Eralp, Second Secretary, Turkish Embassy. called at 10:30 a.m. today. I handed him the text of the note delivered by Ambassador Wilson to the Turkish Minister for Foreign Affairs at 3:30 p.m., November 2.
Mr. Eralp read the note and smiled broadly. He said that in his opinion it was “very satisfactory” and that “Turkey could have hoped for nothing better.”
A copy of the communication handed to Mr. Eralp is attached.See telegram 1049, October 30, 3 p.m., p. 1265.
